The Everything Store: Jeff Bezos and the Age of Amazon
Stone, Brad
Library Journal, 5/15/2013, volume 138, issue 9, page 56 (1p)
Academic Search Ultimate
A review of the book "The Everything Store" by Brad Stone, charting Amazon's history from online bookseller to global retail platform.
PDF Full Text
Online Retail and the Transformation of American Shopping
Hyman, Louis
Journal of Retail Studies, Mar2024, volume 12, issue 2
Business Source Ultimate
This article examines how online retail platforms reshaped consumer behavior, distribution networks, and labor markets in the United States since the early 2000s.
